name: brous-movie-engine
description: Brous Movie Engine / Horror Roki — static PWA + Cloudflare Worker.

scripts.build:pages: npm run build:css && mkdir -p .pages-dist && cp index.html manifest.json .pages-dist/ && cp -R js .pages-dist/ && cp styles.css tailwind.css .pages-dist/
scripts.deploy:pages: npm run build:pages && wrangler pages deploy .pages-dist --project-name brous-movie-engine --branch main --commit-dirty=true
